title: selinum japonicum
intro: Selinum japonicum, also known as Japanese angelica or Japanese parsley, is a perennial plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Selinum japonicum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional cooking in some Asian cuisines.
